displayName: Agent Runtime - High P95 Request Latency (${AGENT_NAME})

documentation.content: This alert fires when the P95 request latency of the Agent Runtime instance (${LOCATION}/${REASONING_ENGINE_ID} - ${AGENT_NAME}) rises above 120s for 5 minutes or more.

conditions.displayName: Agent Runtime - High P95 Request Latency (${AGENT_NAME})

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "aiplatform.googleapis.com/ReasoningEngine" AND (resource.labels.location = "${LOCATION}" AND resource.labels.reasoning_engine_id = "${REASONING_ENGINE_ID}") AND metric.type = "aiplatform.googleapis.com/reasoning_engine/request_latencies"
